data.content: Implementation artifact ready. Branch: codex/2475-beat-state-overview. Commit: fd6b433688e15fad445879131119474ec62b05c8. Summary: added `/beats?view=overview`, a non-draggable state-grouped overview of visible beats; wired the Overview header tab and view cycle; prevented overview from inheriting queue/active state filters; excluded internal lease records from the overview surface; preserved existing beat detail lightbox behavior; fixed mobile header overflow by making the view switcher a contained horizontal scroll row on small screens. Verification: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, Playwright desktop/mobile check at http://localhost:4137/beats?view=overview with no horizontal page overflow and no lease rows.
